creator: dschreiber9325@gmail.com
text:
Running FreeNAS 11.2-RC1
10Gig of RAM

Shortly changed CPU to an AMD Phenom II x6 1090T and now i have this Error:

Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
cpuid = 4; apic id = 04
fault virtual address   = 0x0
fault code              = supervisor read instruction, page not present
instruction pointer     = 0x20:0x0
stack pointer           = 0x28:0xfffffe02c7a63390
frame pointer           = 0x28:0xffffffff80f96c02
code segment            = base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
                        = DPL 0, pres 1, long 1, def32 0, gran 1
processor eflags        = interupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0
currentprocess          = 2459(net)



Server keeps rebooting.
